message:
fix(window): update platform window implementations for frankenterm compatibility

Update promise/spawn.rs and window platform backends (macOS, Wayland,
Windows, X11, XDG desktop portal) with compatibility fixes for the
frankenterm workspace integration. Adjustments to window creation,
event handling, and portal interface calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
